CreateVpc.name: VPC name, 1-65 characters, cannot be 'default'
CreateVpc.cidr: IPv4 CIDR block of the VPC, e.g. 192.168.0.0/16
CreateVpc.enableIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 (true=enable, default false)
CreateVpc.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to attach to the VPC

DescribeVpcs.vpcIds: Comma-separated list of VPC IDs to query

DescribeVpc.desc: Get detailed information about a specific VPC

UpdateVpc.desc: Update VPC name, description, or other attributes
UpdateVpc.vpcId: ID of the VPC to update
UpdateVpc.name: New VPC name, 1-65 characters, cannot be 'default'
UpdateVpc.secondaryCidr: List of secondary CIDR blocks for the VPC (full replacement)

DeleteVpc.desc: Delete a VPC. Ensure no subnets or other resources exist inside
DeleteVpc.vpcId: ID of the VPC to delete

DescribeVpcPrivateIps.desc: Query private IP address information within a VPC
DescribeVpcPrivateIps.privateIpAddresses: List of private IPs to query (mutually exclusive with privateIpRange)

DescribeVpcResourceIps.desc: Query private IPs occupied by cloud products within a VPC
DescribeVpcResourceIps.resourceType: Product type, e.g. bcc, enic, blb

DisableVpcRelay.desc: Disable VPC relay (relay must be currently enabled)

CreateSubnet.desc: Create a subnet within a VPC
CreateSubnet.name: Subnet name, 1-65 characters, cannot be 'default'
CreateSubnet.cidr: IPv4 CIDR block, must be within the VPC CIDR range
CreateSubnet.vpcId: ID of the VPC to create the subnet in
CreateSubnet.enableIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 (true=enable, default false)
CreateSubnet.vpcSecondaryCidr: Secondary CIDR of the VPC that the subnet belongs to
CreateSubnet.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to attach to the subnet

DescribeSubnets.subnetType: Filter by subnet type: BCC or BBC
DescribeSubnets.subnetIds: Comma-separated list of subnet IDs to query

DescribeSubnet.desc: Get detailed information about a specific subnet

UpdateSubnet.desc: Update subnet name, description, or other attributes
UpdateSubnet.subnetId: ID of the subnet to update
UpdateSubnet.name: New subnet name, 1-65 characters

DeleteSubnet.subnetId: ID of the subnet to delete

CreateIpReserve.desc: Create a reserved IP range within a subnet
CreateIpReserve.subnetId: ID of the subnet the reserved range belongs to
CreateIpReserve.ipCidr: Reserved IP address or CIDR block
CreateIpReserve.ipVersion: IP version: 4 for IPv4, 6 for IPv6

DeleteIpReserve.ipReserveId: ID of the reserved IP range to delete

DescribeRouteTables.routeTableId: Route table ID (mutually exclusive with vpcId)

CreateRouteRule.desc: Create a route rule in a route table
CreateRouteRule.nexthopId: Next hop ID (required for single-path routes)
CreateRouteRule.nextHopList: List of next hops for multi-path routes

DescribeRouteRules.desc: List route rules for a route table or VPC
DescribeRouteRules.routeTableId: Route table ID (mutually exclusive with vpcId)

UpdateRouteRule.desc: Update a route rule (single-path routes only)
UpdateRouteRule.routeRuleId: ID of the route rule to update

DeleteRouteRule.routeRuleId: ID of the route rule to delete

SwitchRouteHA.desc: Switch primary to backup in a multi-path HA route

DescribeAcl.desc: Query ACL information for a VPC

DescribeAclRules.desc: List ACL rules for a subnet

CreateAclRules.desc: Add ACL rules in batch (max 20 per request)
CreateAclRules.aclRules: List of ACL rules to add
CreateAclRules.aclRules.subnetId: Subnet ID the rule belongs to

CreateSecurityGroup.desc: Create a security group with optional rules
CreateSecurityGroup.name: Security group name, 1-65 characters, must start with a letter
CreateSecurityGroup.vpcId: VPC ID the security group belongs to
CreateSecurityGroup.rules: List of security group rules to bind on creation
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.sourceIp: Inbound source IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.destIp: Outbound destination IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
CreateSecurityGroup.rules.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)
CreateSecurityGroup.tags: List of tags to bind on creation

DescribeSecurityGroups.instanceId: Cloud instance ID to filter associated security groups
DescribeSecurityGroups.securityGroupId: Specific security group ID to query
DescribeSecurityGroups.securityGroupIds: Comma-separated list of security group IDs to query

DescribeSecurityGroup.desc: Get detailed information about a security group

DeleteSecurityGroup.securityGroupId: ID of the security group to delete

AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.desc: Add a new rule to a security group
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule: Security group rule object to authorize
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceIp: Inbound source IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destIp: Outbound destination IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)

RevokeSecurityGroupRule.desc: Remove a rule from a security group
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule: Security group rule object to revoke
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceIp: Inbound source IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destIp: Outbound destination IP or CIDR (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)

UpdateSecurityGroupRule.sourceIp: Inbound source IP (mutually exclusive with sourceGroupId)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.sourceGroupId: Inbound source security group ID (mutually exclusive with sourceIp)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.destIp: Outbound destination IP (mutually exclusive with destGroupId)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.destGroupId: Outbound destination security group ID (mutually exclusive with destIp)
UpdateSecurityGroupRule.protocol: Protocol (tcp/udp to icmp conversion not supported)

DeleteSecurityGroupRule.securityGroupRuleId: ID of the security group rule to delete
